title: InvisiFrames
description: A resource pack that makes item frames and glow item frames invisible
body:
InvisiFrames is a small resource pack to make item frames and glow item frames invisible!\
This can add to build decoration when making a build!\
To see where they are, you can always show hitboxes with F3+B. or Fn+F3+B on some systems.\
![With vs Without the pack](https://i.postimg.cc/dVQq8K22/icon.png)\
Enjoy!
